result.text:
Let’s talk about @DQNorg’s journey.
it’s nothing short of inspiring. What began as a simple PFP NFT drop back in April 2023 has blossomed into top NFT collections on AVAX🔺 

With a dedicated team driving it forward, this project has built a thriving community and a growing cultural impact. 

The current floor price sits at an impressive 42 AVAX,
And they reward to holders with real value.

And now they're preparing for the next step with @dqn404 🔺

Their application is now closed, and if you've already submitted an application, they are manually screening everything👁️

Interact with them and keep them watching you!
#AI404 #DQN $ERROR
